title: 菊花賞の後に・フクキタル、開☆眼

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru gives it her all on the
chrysanthemum stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the strenuous undertaking, she states
joyfully that the gods have made her the
incarnation of happiness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Concerned by the crazed glint in her eye, I leave
most of her schedule open until the Kinko Sho
next spring.
